name: Valor
notes: Highly ambiguous — 'Valor' alone matches Valor Ventures (Atlanta, valor.vc), Valor Equity Partners (Chicago, valorep.com), and Valor Capital Group (New York). Since 'Valor Ventures' appears as a separate record in this batch, this entry may refer to Valor Equity Partners or another entity. Cannot confidently assign domain/location without more context.

name: Valor Ventures
notes: Atlanta-based seed-stage VC firm, 659 Auburn Ave Suite 158, Atlanta GA 30312. Confirmed via valor.vc and Crunchbase.

name: Outlander VC
notes: Early-stage VC firm. SEC registration and multiple sources confirm Los Angeles, CA. Some sources list Atlanta as secondary/alternate; LA is the primary HQ.

Seven Seven Six (776), founded by Alexis Ohanian. Registered HQ in Jupiter, FL (6671 W. Indiantown Road, Suite 50-183). Signed NYC office lease at 216 Lafayette St in 2025 but primary HQ remains Jupiter, FL.

name: Max
notes: Assumed to be Max (formerly HBO Max), the Warner Bros. Discovery streaming service headquartered at 30 Hudson Yards, New York, NY. 'Max' is a generic name with many possible matches; confidence is medium.

name: AIR Ventures
notes: Family-backed early-stage consumer-focused VC firm, founded 2022, Los Angeles, CA. Founded by second-generation founders from Guthy-Renker. Confirmed via Tracxn and firm website.

name: Ben Zises
notes: Ben Zises is Founder & GP of SuperAngel.Fund, based in New York City. Recorded as a person/entity in CRM; website and domain reflect his fund. Confidence is medium because this is an individual, not a traditional company.

name: MBX
notes: MBX Capital — deep health / biotech/healthtech VC founded 2015, HQ Claymont, Delaware (2093 Philadelphia Pike #8808). Invests in healthcare and biotechnology early-stage companies. Domain mbxcapital.com already provided in input.

name: BeautyBoss®
notes: beautyboss.com is an AI-powered private-label/print-on-demand beauty brand launch platform (BeautyBoss Profits). No clear HQ city found — company appears to operate remotely. Multiple unrelated 'BeautyBoss' businesses exist (e.g., a Bethesda MD microblading clinic). Could not confirm US HQ city with confidence.

name: ShineOn
notes: ShineOn is the #1 print-on-demand personalized jewelry platform, HQ at 3340 Scherer Drive North Suite E, St. Petersburg, FL 33716. Founded 2016 by Eric Toz. Confirmed by LeadIQ, ZoomInfo, Facebook.

name: Lembas Health
notes: AI nutrition operating system for medical practices (B2B2C). City and state were already present in input (New York, NY). Industry added: HealthTech. Confirmed via PitchBook and company website.

name: Birdwatch
notes: Home maintenance/repair platform (public benefit corporation). Founded 2021 by Lisa Wise, Chris Rosenbaum, Ryan Troll. HQ Washington DC with Philadelphia presence. City and state already present in input. Industry added: PropTech.
